name: Toffee Chip Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Cream together butter, brown sugar, and vanilla until well blended.
2. Mix in flour and baking powder until combined. Press the dough evenly into an ungreased 9 x 13-inch baking pan, flattening it out. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before cutting into triangles or 2-inch squares.
3. Prepare topping by melting chocolate chips, butter, and water in a double boiler over hot water. Stir until smooth. Remove the top of the double boiler from the heat and let the chocolate thicken slightly. Drop a large dollop of chocolate into the center of each square or triangle.
4. Sprinkle Bits of Brickle Baking Chips generously over the wet chocolate. Refrigerate for about 15 minutes to set. Gently lift the squares with a spatula and shake off any excess Bits of Brickle before serving.
